infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to show nearby points of interest and automatically play audio guides when you enter their zones.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to show nearby points of interest and automatically play audio guides when you enter their zones.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes for instant POI information.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access may be needed for recording or other audio features.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Vinh Khanh Guide to access your location.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Vinh Khanh Guide to access your camera for scanning QR codes.
